description: Hook showing the shortest war in history
prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of the Sultan's palace in Zanzibar under a dark dawn sky, a large antique brass clock in the foreground showing 9:00 AM, low-angle wide shot, dramatic storm clouds gathering over the harbor, tense and ominous mood, warm sunrise light contrasting with deep shadows, highly detailed 19th-century architecture.

description: Death of Sultan Hamad bin Thuwaini
prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of Sultan Hamad bin Thuwaini lying motionless in an ornate palace chamber, attendants in traditional Omani-Zanzibari robes standing in shock, medium shot from doorway, solemn mood, soft golden light through carved windows, rich fabrics and historical decor, highly detailed.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of Khalid bin Barghash standing on palace steps in ceremonial robes, surrounded by armed guards and supporters, low-angle hero shot, determined and defiant mood, bright tropical daylight, fluttering red flags, the palace towering behind him.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of British officials aboard a warship in Zanzibar harbor, one officer reading an ultimatum, over-the-shoulder shot toward the palace in the distance, stern mood, cool blue morning light, polished brass instruments and naval uniforms, historically accurate late Victorian details.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of Basil Cave presenting a formal document to Khalid bin Barghash inside a grand audience hall, symmetrical medium shot, tense atmosphere, shafts of sunlight illuminating dust in the air, ornate carved doors and historical furnishings.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of Khalid bin Barghash seated on a throne, expression calm but resolute, guards lined behind him with rifles, close-up shot from slightly below eye level, defiant mood, moody interior lighting with strong shadows and warm highlights.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of five British warships firing broadsides toward the Sultan's palace, dynamic wide shot from sea level, explosive cannon smoke and flashes, intense action mood, bright morning sunlight cutting through smoke, detailed naval vessels and ocean waves.

Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of the Zanzibar palace partially collapsed and burning, smoke rising into the sky, scattered debris and fleeing civilians, elevated wide shot, tragic and chaotic mood, orange firelight mixed with daylight, historically accurate architecture.

description: Khalid escapes to the German consulate
prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of Khalid bin Barghash hurriedly entering the German consulate gates under guard, rear tracking shot, urgent and desperate mood, late morning sunlight, European colonial building with palm trees and anxious onlookers.

description: The war ends in just 38 minutes
prompt: Vertical 9:16 cinematic realistic digital painting of a quiet Zanzibar harbor after the battle, smoke lingering above the ruined palace, a large pocket watch in the foreground showing 9:38 AM, contemplative wide shot, reflective mood, soft sunlight breaking through clouds, highly detailed and cinematic.
